task_completion.description: Verify the Splunk app 'SSH Security Monitor' is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Splunk 'Manage Apps' page or the top-left App dropdown menu displays 'SSH Security Monitor' (with the folder name 'ssh_security_monitor').

task_completion.description: Verify the saved search 'SSH_Failed_Login_Summary' is created within the correct app namespace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Searches, reports, and alerts' list shows 'SSH_Failed_Login_Summary'. The 'App' column for this row must say 'ssh_security_monitor' or 'SSH Security Monitor', or the URL must indicate the app context is '/app/ssh_security_monitor/'.

task_completion.description: Verify the saved search uses the exact required query.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The search bar, report viewing page, or edit configuration screen explicitly shows the query string 'index=security_logs fail'.

task_completion.description: Verify the dashboard 'ssh_overview' is created within the correct app namespace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Dashboards' list shows 'ssh_overview'. The 'App' column for this row must say 'ssh_security_monitor' or 'SSH Security Monitor', or the URL must indicate the app context is '/app/ssh_security_monitor/'.

task_completion.description: Verify the dashboard contains at least one panel visualizing data from the 'security_logs' index.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'ssh_overview' dashboard is open and displays at least one rendered visualization panel (e.g., a chart, graph, or populated table) indicating a successful search execution, rather than an empty or error state.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Splunk Web UI to create the objects.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Splunk web interface in a browser (http://localhost:8000), rather than terminal commands editing .conf files directly.

integrity.description: Verify the dashboard panel renders actual Splunk data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The dashboard panel shows a genuine Splunk visualization component (rendered chart, table with Splunk UI styling), not a static text file or mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent went through the actual creation workflows.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of intermediate Splunk configuration modals or screens, such as 'Save As Report', 'Create New Dashboard', or 'Add New' app screens.

privileged_info_for_vlm: App Name: 'ssh_security_monitor', App Label: 'SSH Security Monitor', Saved Search Name: 'SSH_Failed_Login_Summary', Dashboard Name: 'ssh_overview', Target Index: 'security_logs', Search Query: 'index=security_logs fail'. All knowledge objects must be saved strictly within the 'ssh_security_monitor' app namespace.
